title: RiderCategory
description: A classification of passenger type (e.g., adult, child, senior, student) used to determine applicable fare entitlements.

riderCategoryId.description: Unique identifier for the rider category

eligibilityRules.description: Rules defining who qualifies for this rider category

proofRequired.description: Type of proof required to qualify (e.g. student ID, senior card)

id.description: Unique identifier for the category code

parentCategoryId.description: Identifier of the parent category if hierarchical
